input.content:
lexeme_import_learning_report
  issue "660"
  decision "awaiting_human_review"
  promotion_gate "bulk_lexeme_import_integrity_and_dual_agent_cli_e2e_pass"
  record_type "agent_cli_auto_learning"
  substrate "links_network"
  retention_formula "reads + writes + incoming_links + outgoing_links"
  expression_count "8"
  validation_warning_count "0"
  multi_hop_seed "observation:entity-label-provenance"
  multi_hop_recall "observation:entity-label-provenance|lesson:truthful-surface-source"
  learned_expression_01
    id "observation:entity-label-provenance"
    text "message
user
The initial importer read Wikidata item labels, so it must identify Q-record label fields honestly instead of claiming unsupported Lexeme L-record provenance."
    reads "10"
    writes "1"
    incoming_links "1"
    outgoing_links "0"
    retention_score "12"
    qualifiers "conversation_id=issue-660|kind=message|role=user"
    validation "aligned"
  learned_expression_02
    id "observation:coverage-denominator"
    text "message
user
Accepted counts without requested and expected-surface denominators can conceal a batch whose rejected portion is large."
    reads "7"
    writes "1"
    incoming_links "1"
    outgoing_links "0"
    retention_score "9"
    qualifiers "conversation_id=issue-660|kind=message|role=user"
    validation "aligned"
  learned_expression_03
    id "observation:ephemeral-rejections"
    text "message
user
The first implementation appended import_rejected to an in-process EventLog and then discarded that log when the CLI exited."
    reads "8"
    writes "1"
    incoming_links "0"
    outgoing_links "0"
    retention_score "9"
    qualifiers "conversation_id=issue-660|kind=message|role=user"
    validation "aligned"
  learned_expression_04
    id "observation:stale-shards"
    text "message
user
Writing only current shard names leaves obsolete importer-owned shards active when a later batch becomes smaller."
    reads "6"
    writes "1"
    incoming_links "1"
    outgoing_links "0"
    retention_score "8"
    qualifiers "conversation_id=issue-660|kind=message|role=user"
    validation "aligned"
  learned_expression_05
    id "lesson:truthful-surface-source"
    text "learning_amendment
assistant
Carry record id and JSON field per surface, validate them before emission, and print them inline so source closure is reviewable without invented identifiers.
observation:entity-label-provenance"
    reads "1"
    writes "4"
    incoming_links "0"
    outgoing_links "1"
    retention_score "6"
    qualifiers "conversation_id=issue-660|kind=learning_amendment|role=assistant"
    validation "aligned"
  learned_expression_06
    id "lesson:durable-fail-closed-import"
    text "learning_amendment
assistant
Persist rejection events in the portable memory format and leave the existing shard set unchanged whenever any requested concept is refused.
observation:stale-shards"
    reads "0"
    writes "4"
    incoming_links "0"
    outgoing_links "1"
    retention_score "5"
    qualifiers "conversation_id=issue-660|kind=learning_amendment|role=assistant"
    validation "aligned"
  learned_expression_07
    id "lesson:explicit-coverage-ratio"
    text "learning_amendment
assistant
Report requested concepts, accepted concepts, expected surfaces, emitted surfaces, and the computed permille ratio on every import.
observation:coverage-denominator"
    reads "0"
    writes "3"
    incoming_links "1"
    outgoing_links "1"
    retention_score "5"
    qualifiers "conversation_id=issue-660|kind=learning_amendment|role=assistant"
    validation "aligned"
  learned_expression_08
    id "lesson:self-hosted-review-gate"
    text "learning_amendment
assistant
Have two real external Agent CLIs ask Formal AI to derive the learning artifact, require byte parity, and retain human review before promotion.
lesson:explicit-coverage-ratio"
    reads "0"
    writes "2"
    incoming_links "0"
    outgoing_links "1"
    retention_score "3"
    qualifiers "conversation_id=issue-660|kind=learning_amendment|role=assistant"
    validation "aligned"
